title: Rocket Launcher Mod
description: Add a powerful rocket launcher to Minecraft with this mod. Enhance your combat with explosive projectiles and take your gameplay to the next level!
body:
# 📑 Description

Enhance your Minecraft experience with the Rocket Launcher Mod! This mod adds a powerful rocket launcher to your arsenal, allowing you to launch explosive projectiles and wreak havoc on enemies and structures alike. Perfect for adding excitement to combat and creating new gameplay strategies.

**Caution!** The shot has a significant amount of damage. Please be cautious when shooting in confined spaces and avoid shooting at blocks that are located too close to you.

**Remember to install the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

# ⚙️ Recipes

### Recipe of rocket launcher
![Recipe of rocket launcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0feb991aa21db0f7c6dacdb2dbbce113e0151de.png)

### Recipe of grenade for rocket launcher
![Recipe of grenade for rocket launcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac72c9d7d04c6a60c35dd78a5a39ea77d43de124.png)
